title: Focus 2: At the Travel Agent's (Reisebüro – Phrasen)
description: Nützliche Phrasen im Reisebüro: Assistent und Kundenrollen

items.question: Assistent: Hello, what can I do ___ you?
Assistent: How long would you like to ___?
Assistent: Do you want to go by car, by ___ or by coach?
Assistent: Would you like to ___ a room/a flat?
Assistent: If you're ___ sports, it's a good idea to...
Kunde: I'd like to travel to Brighton ___ my friend. (mit)
Kunde: I think that's too ___. (zu teuer)
Over the ___/For two weeks: Zeitangabe bei Buchung
einfache Fahrkarte (nicht Hin und zurück) → ___ ticket
